title: Letter
overview: John is a young boy who's been hospital-bound from an early age. Ever since he saw his first Pokémon battle on TV, he's been a big fan of Champion Leon — and he's dreamed of watching one of Leon's matches in a stadium. Could a visit from Chairman Rose pave the way for his dreams to come true?

title: Training
overview: After losing to Galar's Champion, Leon, Fighting-type Gym Leader Bea sets out with her Pokémon to elevate their training. Will she find her inner resolve and grow stronger... or will she succumb to the pressure of defeat?

title: Buddy
overview: Hop is to busy watching Champion Leon's match on TV, making his Wooloo jealous. Wooloo ends up wandering off on its own.  What could possibly happen to it?

title: Early-Evening Waves
overview: Reintroducing Nessa: beloved Galar region Gym Leader and model! She strives to be the best in both fields... but Chairman Rose advises her to focus on one path to have the most success. Will she sacrifice one dream in pursuit of the other?

title: Assistant
overview: Rose may be the Chairman, but it's Oleana who keeps things running in Galar.

title: Moonlight
overview: After getting into an argument with his friend John, Tommy wants to make amends. He enlists Allister, Galar's Ghost-type Gym Leader, to help in a most unusual way.

title: Sky
overview: It's all come down to this.
